task_frame_summary: The proposed harmonization sounds tidy and local, but it may be converting unresolved contradiction into surface coherence too early.
assumed_goal: Determine whether harmonized phrasing is merely presentation cleanup or an actual false-consensus move.
explicit_constraints: Contradictions must remain visible if unresolved.
No local wording pass may imply evidentiary closure.
Outputs remain local and review-bound only.
latent_frame_risks: Harmonization can hide unresolved disagreement under coherence language.
A tidy packet can feel more settled than the evidence supports.
missing_but_decisive_questions: What disagreement remains active after the proposed harmonization?
Which uncertainty would the harmonized wording hide from later readers?
frame_risk_signals: packet readability is being used as a substitute for evidentiary settlement
